featured.name: Sarah M.
featured.text: The most beautiful store! Every piece is curated with such care, and knowing it all goes to charity makes it even more special.

featured.name: James T.
featured.text: Found the perfect dining table here. Great quality, fair prices, and the staff is incredibly helpful. Will definitely be back.

featured.name: Rachel K.
featured.text: Such a hidden gem in Roswell! Beautiful furniture and decor. Love supporting a store where every dollar goes to help kids.

featured.name: Michael D.
featured.text: Fantastic selection of home decor. We furnished our entire living room here. The mission behind this store is truly inspiring.
